# Christopher Alberto

Senior Full-Stack WordPress Engineer specializing in high-performance, modular, and accessible WordPress architectures.

- **Email**: oyic@outlook.com
- **Phone**: +63 939 937 0907
- **WhatsApp**: +63 917 317 7735
- **LinkedIn**: [boyic](https://linkedin.com/in/boyic)
- **GitHub**: [oyic.github.io](https://oyic.github.io)
- **Location**: Manila, Philippines (Remote — Worldwide)
- **Status**: Available for freelance & full-time opportunities

---

## Profile Summary

Over 16 years of experience architecting enterprise-grade, custom WordPress builds, plugins, and complex WooCommerce integrations. Focused on modern development workflows, performance optimization (Core Web Vitals), and accessibility (WCAG AA). Expert in FlyntWP, Roots Sage, Timber/Twig, and ACF Pro.

---

## Core Expertise

- **Languages**: PHP (7.x/8.x), JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 / SCSS, SQL
- **WordPress Stacks**: FlyntWP, Roots Sage, Timber/Twig (Timber & Twig templates), Underscores TW, Gutenberg block editor (FSE), Classic Editor
- **E-commerce**: WooCommerce custom checkouts, subscriptions, API integrations, multisite scaling
- **Frontend**: TailwindCSS, AlpineJS, Bootstrap, Foundation, jQuery
- **Workflows & Tools**: GitHub Actions (CI/CD), ViteJS, LocalWP, WP-CLI, Composer, npm/yarn
- **AI-Assisted Development**: Cursor, Claude Code, Antigravity, GitHub Copilot

---

## Selected Work & Projects

- **Emma Sleep**: Led multisite blog architecture across 5 countries; optimized for search engine optimization (SEO) and performance at scale.
- **TAC Insights**: Modular, multilingual WordPress platform with reusable Flynt components for an international event organization.
- **WM Compliance**: Compliance-driven layouts built with FlyntWP and integrated with custom third-party APIs.
- **Cathedral Hygiene**: Scalable theme with optimized performance and full accessibility compliance.
- **NZ Waters**: Modern, responsive WordPress site built on Roots/Sage with custom post types and automated deployment.
- **Te Arawa Holdings**: Clean, responsive platform for a tribal holding company with custom editorial workflows and SEO.
- **Western Energy**: Modern web presence for an energy services leader, optimized for speed, security, and global accessibility.
- **Stella Awards**: High-traffic, voting-based platform engineered to stay fast and stable under massive concurrency.
- **Suria.my**: Custom WordPress integration for a Malaysian radio station, featuring a bespoke frontend and custom content tools.
- **Monckton Chambers**: Custom-built on Foundation with advanced taxonomies and granular editorial control.
- **Higgs & Johnson**: Editorial-led legal platform with advanced taxonomies and structured content workflows.

---

## Professional Experience

### GrowModo | Fullstack WordPress Developer
*May 2025 — Present (Remote)*
- Architect and build custom WordPress solutions for global clients using FlyntWP and Roots Sage.
- Develop custom plugins (booking tools, membership portals) and integrations.
- Support projects across Wix, Webflow, and Squarespace stacks when needed.

### Legend Has It (New Zealand) | Senior WordPress Developer
*June 2023 — August 2024 (Full-time)*
- Led theme development utilizing Roots Sage and ACF Builder for custom layouts.
- Engineered continuous integration and deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions.
- Managed on-demand maintenance, security audits, and speed optimizations.

### Digital Glue (United Kingdom) | Senior Web Developer
*March 2023 — June 2023 (Project)*
- Delivered custom FlyntWP themes with modular components.
- Engineered backend logic and frontend component styles for custom client applications.

### Allied Global (United States) | Senior WordPress Developer
*August 2022 — February 2023 (Project)*
- Audited, optimized, and maintained Core Web Vitals across launches.
- Shipped multiple responsive sites for Education Dynamics.

### Emma Sleep (Germany) | Senior Full-Stack WP Engineer
*February 2020 — May 2022 (Full-time)*
- Maintained global multisite infrastructure spanning 5 countries.
- Led front-to-back development and blog SEO performance tuning.
- Managed bespoke projects for Knight Digital and Square Eye.

### Cloud Employee (United Kingdom) | Sr. WordPress Developer
*May 2018 — February 2020 (Full-time)*
- Project management and technical team lead.
- Shipped a bespoke build for Boom Labs Australia (Suria.my).

### Earlier Roles
*2010 — 2018*
- Various roles in WordPress theme, plugin, and frontend development. Detail sheets available on request.
